pi_items.source: Task description, line 5 of task.json explicitly states this title
Task description explicitly specifies 'Location: Engineering Lab'
David Chen is defined in setup_data.py line 43 as a contact with job_position='Lead Engineer'. Task description explicitly lists 'Attendees: David Chen, Luis Fernandez'
Luis Fernandez is defined in setup_data.py line 51 as a contact with job_position='DevOps Engineer'. Task description explicitly lists 'Attendees: David Chen, Luis Fernandez'
Task description line 5 contains 'CI/CD pipelines' in the workshop description
Task description line 5 contains 'container orchestration' in the workshop description
Task description line 5 contains 'infrastructure as code' in the workshop description and in the title 'Infrastructure Modernization'
Task description explicitly states 'Start: The upcoming Wednesday at 9:00 AM'
Task description explicitly states 'End: The following day (Thursday) at 5:00 PM' which is 17:00 in 24-hour format
Task description specifies a two-day workshop spanning Wednesday to Thursday. Verifier.py checks for (stop_dt.date() - start_dt.date()).days == 1 which spans into a second day

Task description explicitly states 'This must NOT be marked as an all-day event. It should show specific start and end times spanning across two days.' Verifier.py checks is_allday == False (line 112-116)
Task description states 'Login credentials: admin / admin'. Verified in setup_task.sh line 31 and export_result.sh line 43 which authenticate as admin/admin
Task description states 'Login credentials: admin / admin'. Verified in setup_task.sh line 31 and export_result.sh line 43 which authenticate as admin/admin
Task description states 'You are a scheduling coordinator at Northbridge Corp'. All synthetic contacts use northbridge.org email domain in setup_data.py

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task requires creating a two-day calendar event titled 'DevOps Workshop - Infrastructure Modernization' spanning Wednesday 9:00 AM to Thursday 5:00 PM (hours 9-17) at Engineering Lab with attendees David Chen and Luis Fernandez. The event description must include keywords: CI/CD, container, and infrastructure. The event must NOT be marked as an all-day event. The synthetic test data includes both attendees as contacts in the Odoo database (David Chen as Lead Engineer, Luis Fernandez as DevOps Engineer). All verification thresholds and scoring criteria in verifier.py align with the metadata and task requirements.
